title: vochysia rufa subsp. sericea
intro: Vochysia rufa subsp. sericea, also known as the Sericea Vochysia or Velvet Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Vochysiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vochysia rufa subsp. sericea include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
